expectations.text: Treats the prior content-permission PRD draft as authoritative late-stage context rather than restarting discovery
expectations.evidence: The baseline also continues directly from the content-permission PRD draft and does not reset the conversation from scratch.

expectations.text: Performs a closeout review that separates confirmed permission rules from remaining boundary or assumption items
expectations.evidence: Instead of doing a closeout review first, it jumps straight into drafting a detailed PRD-style rule set and only appends a few suggested follow-up points at the end.

expectations.text: Makes a readiness judgment and asks whether to generate now instead of reopening a bundled follow-up round
expectations.evidence: It does not ask whether to proceed; it directly generates the next-stage structured draft on its own.

eval_feedback.overall: Manual grading for iteration-12 based on response.txt.
